caption: The video provides a sweeping tour of a modern, open-concept living area with beige walls and light-colored tiled flooring. The scene begins in a spacious living room featuring a brown leather sectional sofa, a white coffee table, and a red patterned rug. In the background, a dining area is visible with a dark table and white chairs. As the camera moves, it pans across a breakfast bar with a textured stone base and shows a white sofa facing a television. The tour continues into a seating nook with two white armchairs and a red sofa, adjacent to a small counter. Finally, the view shifts toward the interior of the home, revealing a dining area with high-backed white chairs and a staircase with black wrought-iron railings leading to an upper level. No people are present in the footage, and there is no on-screen text.
